    We believe that Living Savior Preschool can expand the child's perception of God, of other people, and of the physical world in which God has placed us.

Moving Forward in Faith Commitment Stewardship Statement

During this period of COVID-19 Pandemic, Living Savior ministries and activities have been modified (Zoom & in-person), but we still have opportunities for growth in your faith journey.

Worship, Prayer and Study Opportunities
Sunday Worship: ________ In person and / or _______ Live Streaming

  • Advent Worship Services
  • Lent Worship and Holy Week Services
  • Men’s Prayer & Fellowship Study: Paul Gross
  • Sunday afternoon Bible Studies: Jason Tolbert
  • Sunday evening Study: Dr. Horton & Dr. Benson
  • Vicar Book Club: Vicar Tim
  • Adult Sunday School: Sarah Loesch
  • Confirmation; Vicar Tim
  • Sunday School virtual: Jean Marie Galing

Spiritual Outreach and Service Actions
Fellowship Opportunities

  • Men’s Happy Hour (Friday afternoon) Paul Gross
  • Youth Study & Events: Jonathan Loesch
  • Young Adults (18-35): Victoria & Ben Pierce
  • Special Events - e.g.:Trunk or Treat, Christmas Carols (see church bulletin)
  • Woman’s Retreat
  • Social Ministry: Miki Kolton & Steve Thomas;
  • Crop Walk, Shelter House / NOVACO (Back to School, Christmas gifts),Thanksgiving Boxes, Christmas Angel Tree, Concordia Food Ministry, Operation Christmas Child, Meals for hypothermia shelter, Disaster Relief

Worship Times

Sunday early service
at 8:30am

Sunday late service
at 11:00am

Sunday School Times

K through 5th grade
at 10:00 until 10:45am

Confirmation, HS, and Adult
at 9:45 until 10:45am

For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life. (John 3:16)
